Resonant absorption as a direction filter
If, however, ￼ is already moving, the photon energy in the laboratory frame depends on its emission direction
A photon emitted along the motion of ￼ is Doppler shifted upward and may acquire exactly the energy required for
A photon emitted opposite to the motion of ￼ is shifted downward and can not be absorbed resonantly

Resonant absorption selects photons emitted along the recoil direction of ￼.
